synNeedRoot: SYN scan requires root privileges when yak starts
synConcurrentHelp: Number of SYN packets sent per second, considered as SYN concurrency
activeModeHelp: Allow fingerprint probing to send active packets
serviceFingerprintLevelHelp: Higher level means more detailed probing, more active packets, and longer time
activePacketTimeoutHelp: Detection of certain fingerprints requires checking the target's response to a specific probe request, which requires active packet sending
tcpProxyHelp: Supports HTTP/Sock4/Sock4a/Socks5 protocols, e.g., http://127.0.0.1:7890 socks5://127.0.0.1:7890
invalidFileType: {{name}} is not a txt or Excel file, please upload txt or Excel format!
innerTargetConcurrentHelp: How many brute force tasks to execute per target simultaneously
autoStopHelp: Terminate the task when the first brute force result is found
crawlerSettingsHelp: After discovering that the website content is an HTTP(s) service, perform basic crawling to discover more data
autoScanCClassHelp: Convert domain/IP to C-class targets and scan directly
hostAliveScanHelp: Host alive detection, using ICMP/TCP Ping based on current user permissions
tcpPingPortHelp: Configure TCP Ping ports: use whether these ports are open as the basis for TCP Ping
scanTargetPlaceholder: Domain/Host/IP/IP range, separated by comma or line
dragFilesHelp: Drag TXT or Excel files into the box or
templateNamePlaceholder: Please give a name for the fingerprint config...
dragYamlFilesHelp: Drag yaml or yml files into the box or
jsSsaParserHelp: Perform JS SSA analysis when crawling is enabled. Enabling this will use significant resources and cause CPU spikes. Recommended to keep closed if not needed
